name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 59-60 of operational silence. **MASHHAD-MURAL-REFUTATION WINDOW EXPIRED (Day 9-10 of 7) — STILL NO PROOF-OF-LIFE BEYOND AI-GENERATED/WRITTEN STATEMENTS.** Iran International reporting May 5-6 confirms Mojtaba reported 'severely injured' (multiple surgeries on legs and arms, severe burns to face and lips, struggling to speak) per Iranian officials. CNN April 21 framing 'leader no one has seen' holds. Through the highest-pressure events of the crisis arc — Trump's May 4 14-point rejection, Iran's multi-axis kinetic restart, Trump's May 5 pause/'Complete and Final Agreement' framing via Pakistan — Mojtaba operationally silent. The Reuters Apr 28 wire-tier 'figurehead not principal' framing operationally vindicated; IRGC inner circle led by Vahidi dominates. Per intel.md A7: UNCHANGED — non-event IS the signal. The mural-refutation trigger remains UNRESOLVED with the window now 9-10 days expired (RESOLVED-NO).
